# task-phase6-worktree-message-scope-decision — Phase 6 decision: worktree messaging scope
status: done  priority: 1  scope: scope-git

Resolve the Phase 6 open boundary: messages are currently scoped to the project folder/checkout, so agents working in separate git worktrees do not see each other's messages until records are merged. Decide whether V1 accepts checkout-local messaging or needs a shared ledger/message location for worktree-per-agent workflows.

## Acceptance
- An ADR records the decision, rationale, consequences, and deferred alternatives.
- docs/roadmap.md Phase 6 no longer has an unresolved messaging-scope boundary.
- The decision explicitly covers separate worktrees, normal branches in one checkout, merge behavior, and whether any shared message location is introduced.
- If behavior changes, follow-up tasks are added for implementation; if checkout-local messaging remains, docs explain the limitation.
- bun test, typecheck, biome check, and waystation validate are clean.
